config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, a healthy society protects personal rights first and only limits them when there is a clear, necessary reason like public safety. From my perspective, collective good is important, but it should not erase human dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami penuh dengan contoh ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, jadi saya sangat curiga pada klaim semacam itu. Hak individu memang tidak absolut, tetapi justru hak itulah yang menjadi pagar agar mayoritas atau negara tidak melangkahi martabat orang per orang. Kepentingan masyarakat penting, namun menurut saya harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, bukan sebaliknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still disagree with the statement: society’s interests matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of prioritizing harmony and collective duty, but I also know how easily “for the public good” can become a excuse for silencing people, especially when power is uneven. In practice, a society is healthier when it protects basic rights first and only limits them for clear, proportional reasons like safety or preventing harm. If the collective always comes first, the individual becomes too easy to sacrifice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, jadi saya tidak percaya pada prioritas yang terlalu luas bagi masyarakat. Hak individu memang bisa dibatasi, tetapi hanya secara sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, misalnya untuk mencegah bahaya nyata. Kalau tidak, mayoritas atau negara bisa dengan mudah mengorbankan martabat orang per orang atas nama kebaikan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because that makes it too easy to excuse abuse in the name of unity or order. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand why people value harmony and community, but I have also seen how “for the public interest” can be used to silence criticism or pressure minorities. Society is strongest when it protects basic rights first and limits them only when there is a clear, proportional, and necessary reason. If the collective always wins by default, individual dignity becomes fragile.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, dan perluasan kekuasaan negara, jadi saya tidak mau memberi masyarakat cek kosong untuk mengalahkan individu. Yang menurut saya masuk akal adalah keseimbangan yang ketat: hak individu tetap menjadi dasar, dan pembatasan hanya sah kalau benar-benar perlu, jelas alasannya, dan proporsional. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alat untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
